title: The Tower of the Seven Hunchbacks
writer: Emilio Carrere, José Santugini, Edgar Neville
actors: Antonio Casal, Isabel de Pomés, Guillermo Marín
plot: In 19th-century Madrid a young man plays roulette. A mysterious character helps him by pointing with his walking stick the next number on which the ball will fall; the protagonist is the only one able to see him. The mysterious ma...
